zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持弱势整理结构，价格运行在2068附近，24小时波动有限，显示市场观望情绪较浓。由于价格持续受压于20日均线2094一带，短线趋势仍偏空，反弹动能暂未明显恢复。

从技术指标看，MACD处于零轴下方且维持负值，说明空头仍占据主动。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格低位横盘表现，市场存在一定超跌修复需求，不过力度预计有限，难以迅速形成趋势反转。

关键支撑位首先关注2065区域，若跌破则可能进一步测试2050甚至2030附近。上方短线阻力集中在2085至2095区间，其中20日均线附近将成为多头重新夺回主动权的重要位置。

交易策略方面，短线建议以高位轻仓做空思路为主，等待价格反弹接近2090附近再观察承压信号。激进交易者可关注2065支撑的短线反抽机会，但需严格控制仓位与止损风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD remains under mild bearish pressure, trading at 2068.6 and holding near the lower end of the session range between 2068.58 and 2076.87. Price is positioned below the 20-period simple moving average at 2094.41, indicating that short-term momentum favors sellers. The inability to reclaim the moving average suggests the broader recovery attempt remains fragile, while the modest 24-hour decline of 0.18% reflects a market lacking strong directional conviction.

Technical indicators reinforce the cautious outlook. The MACD value at -9.76 remains in negative territory, signaling persistent downside momentum and confirming that bearish pressure has not fully dissipated. Although RSI data is unavailable, price action relative to the SMA suggests momentum remains weak rather than oversold. Traders should monitor whether MACD begins to flatten or rise toward the signal line, as that could provide an early indication that selling pressure is easing.

Key support is developing around 2068, which coincides with the session low and current trading area. A decisive break below this level could expose the psychological 2050 zone, followed by potential downside toward 2025. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 2077, the recent intraday high. A stronger resistance band is located around 2094–2100, where the 20-period SMA may attract renewed selling interest unless buying volume increases substantially.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation before entering new positions. Bullish setups become more attractive if ETH closes above 2094 and sustains momentum toward 2100, potentially targeting higher resistance levels. Conversely, failure to hold 2068 could favor short-term bearish trades with disciplined risk management. Given the current mixed environment, tight stop-loss placement and careful position sizing remain essential while the market searches for a clearer directional catalyst.
